summary: This is a brief announcement post promoting Zephyr Teachout's upcoming visit to the Alternative Banking group meeting. Teachout, a Fordham Law professor, is running against Andrew Cuomo in the Democratic primary for New York Governor. The post highlights her anti-corruption and trust-busting campaign platform, as well as her background in antitrust law and progressive organizing. O'Neil encourages readers to attend and spread the word about the event.
key_points: Zephyr Teachout is challenging incumbent Andrew Cuomo in the NY Democratic gubernatorial primary
Teachout's campaign focuses on anti-corruption and breaking up big bank power
Her background includes directing internet organizing for Howard Dean's 2004 campaign and co-founding A New Way Forward
The Alternative Banking group meeting will also discuss a Stiglitz article on economic mythology if time permits
money_quotes: Come hear candidate Teachout talk about her anti-corruption trust-busting campaign against Governor Cuomo.
She co-founded A New Way Forward, an organization built to break up the power of big banks.
key_insight: This announcement post signals O'Neil's support for anti-corruption political challengers who take on entrenched financial power, connecting her Alternative Banking activism to electoral politics.
